title: Neomarica martii
taxonomy: Neomarica martii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, which is commonly known as the iris family. It is a genus of flowering plants that are native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Neomarica martii is a type of flowering plant that blooms in the spring and summer months, producing long, thin leaves and vibrant, yellow flowers. The plant is often found growing in moist, woodland environments and is valued for its attractive flowers and unique foliage. Within the Iridaceae family, Neomarica martii is part of the tribe Irideae.
